scope: qrel-to-baseline report alignment verification for the 94.0 cohort gate
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The cohort gate now detects stale baseline reports when the real qrel fixture changes, so learner-facing RAG regressions are measured against the correct 200-query suite instead of silently reusing mismatched report metadata.
notes: This wave did not modify the cohort fixture payload or any corpus docs.
The baseline report metadata and per-cohort totals currently match the real qrel contract.
